test.create_query: CREATE TABLE projection_materialize ( key UInt64, val UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO projection_materialize SELECT number, rand() FROM numbers(50000000)
ALTER TABLE projection_materialize ADD PROJECTION agg_proj (SELECT key % 1000 AS k, sum(val) GROUP BY k)
test.query: ALTER TABLE projection_materialize CLEAR PROJECTION agg_proj, MATERIALIZE PROJECTION agg_proj
